title: Cartomancer — Map Generators
description: System-agnostic Watabou map generators (Realm, City, Village, Cave/Glade, Dungeon, Dwelling) with one-click scene import — walls, doors, multi-level floors, and stair regions. No game system required. Generators created by Watabou (https://watabou.itch.io). Please support him on Patreon (https://www.patreon.com/cw/watawatabou).
